_comment: Versioned SCR assumptions. Loaded into the scr_assumptions UC table. The current row drives all live compute.
_calibration_disclaimer: Sigma values track the EIOPA Standard Formula Annex shape for the corresponding lines of business (motor liability, property, general liability, miscellaneous financial loss) but are reduced to a 4-LoB scheme and are NOT certified for production capital calculation. Demo-grade only.

versions.comment: Initial demo calibration. 4 NL LoBs, simplified BSCR with one Market×UW correlation.
